name: Hawaiian Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 40 ounces pineapple chunks in juice, canned
1/2 lb bacon slices, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving the juice.
2. Combine the vegetable mixture (bacon, red peppers, and mushrooms) with shrimp on skewers in a shallow pan.
3. Mix the sweet-and-sour sauce with the reserved pineapple juice and pour over the kabobs.
4. Grill or broil the kabobs for 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until cooked through. Baste often with the sauce.
